description_long: This object is a long, slender shotgun with a metallic barrel and a wooden stock. The barrel is cylindrical and extends a significant length from the main body, with a dark metallic finish and a slight taper towards the muzzle. The stock is rectangular and appears to be made of wood, featuring a simple, utilitarian design without elaborate engravings or checkering. The receiver section is compact and connects the barrel to the stock, with a visible trigger area and a small, squared trigger guard. There are no visible external magazines, optics, or additional attachments. The overall design is straightforward, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
description: A long, metallic shotgun with a simple wooden stock and a cylindrical barrel, featuring a compact receiver and a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the long barrel and rectangular wooden stock.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel, with the stock mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the barrel and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the trigger guard barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: small, squared trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
